github.name: carmahhawwari/ui-design-brain
github.desc: A Cursor skill that gives AI agents real UI component knowledge — best practices, layout patterns, and design-system conventions for 60+ interface components — so it generates production-grade UI instead of generic output.

github.name: geekjourneyx/jina-cli
github.desc: A lightweight CLI tool wrapping Jina AI Reader API for AI Agents. Fetch and parse any URL into LLM-friendly   formats (Markdown/Text/HTML). Perfect for reading X(Twitter), blogs, and news sites.

github.name: loryoncloud/Memory-Like-A-Tree
github.desc: Memory-Like-A-Tree🌳 Memory management system for AI Agents - Let knowledge grow like a tree. Features confidence-based lifecycle, auto-decay, cross-agent search, and Obsidian sync. 🌳 AI Agent 记忆管理系统 - 让知识像树一样生长。支持置信度生命周期、自动衰减、跨 Agent 搜索、Obsidian 同步。

github.name: aldefy/compose-skill
github.desc: Jetpack Compose Agent Skill — AI-powered coding guidance with actual androidx/androidx source code receipts. Works with Claude Code, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, Cursor, Copilot, Windsurf, and more.

github.name: thx0701/openclaw-virtual-office
github.desc: 🏢 Pixel-art virtual office dashboard for OpenClaw agent sessions. Visualize your AI workers in real-time.

github.name: noahatfin/telos
github.desc: Agent-first intent and constraint tracking layer for Git. Structured, queryable memory for AI coding agents.

github.name: chenhg5/cc-connect
github.desc: Bridge local AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Gemini CLI, Codex) to messaging platforms (Feishu/Lark, DingTalk, Slack, Telegram, Discord, LINE, WeChat Work). Chat with your AI dev assistant from anywhere — no public IP required for most platforms.

github.name: lamost423/openclaw-hybrid-memory
github.desc: Production-ready hybrid memory system combining BM25 keyword search and vector semantic search for AI agents

github.name: 0j/memorykit
github.desc: Persistent memory layer for AI agents

github.name: aashari/ai-agent-skills
github.desc: A collection of reusable AI agent skills for Claude Code, OpenClaw, and compatible AI agent platforms
